variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30928 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 16.9600TH3XLE000V
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHLP30928 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Eppensteiner 16.9600TH3XLE000V. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30928 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MICROFIT® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MICROFIT® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 3µ @ β200

variants.title: Donaldson P166254 Transmission Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169600TH3XLE000V
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P166254 Transmission Filter, Cartridge is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 57122 V Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169600TH3XLE000V
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 57122 V Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 3µ @ β200

variants.title: Filtrec D142G03AV Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169600TH3XLE000V
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D142G03AV. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D142G03AV provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.

variants.title: Fleetguard HF7472 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169600TH3XLE000V
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF7472 hydraulic cartridge filter with synthetic media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
